name: Alter Self
description: You alter your physical form. Choose one of the following options, whose effects last for the duration. You can take a Magic action to change your choice. Aquatic Adaptation: you gain gills and grow webbing, gaining a Swim Speed equal to your Speed, and you can breathe underwater. Change Appearance: you change your appearance, including height, weight, features, voice, hair, coloring, and distinguishing characteristics. Natural Weapons: you grow claws, fangs, spines, horns, or a different natural weapon of your choice, which deals 1d6 + your Strength or Dexterity modifier Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage (your choice), you are proficient with it, and it has the Light property.
